mapper.select: SELECT id, station_id as stationId, strategy_name as strategyName, period_type as periodType, start_hour as startHour, end_hour as endHour, electric_price as electricPrice, service_price as servicePrice, is_active as isActive, create_time as createTime FROM price_strategy WHERE (station_id = #{stationId} OR station_id IS NULL) AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY period_type, start_hour
